No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to ending hunger or improving nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to health or well-being outcomes.

Quality Education.reason: The course directly provides technical and vocational skills (programming) for employment, aligning with Target 4.4. It targets students without prior programming knowledge, enhancing access to quality education.
evidence: 程式設計儼然成為各行各業不可或缺的基本能力
幫助尚未具備程式設計基礎的學生

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course provides programming skills, described as an 'indispensable basic ability in all walks of life,' directly supporting productive employment and technological upgrading (Target 8.2, 8.5).
evidence: 程式設計儼然成為各行各業不可或缺的基本能力

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course teaches core programming concepts, data science (Pandas), and web scraping, which are key skills for enhancing scientific research, technological capabilities, and innovation in industry (Target 9.5, 9.b).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to peace, justice, or institutions.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course enhances the use of information technology (programming) as an enabling technology (Target 17.8) by teaching students to process data and solve problems, which builds capacity for achieving other SDGs.
evidence: 處理資料進而解決問題
